problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
